title: OmbudsmanComplaint
description: A 'help with a city agency' request to the NYC Public Advocate — the office's constitutional ombudsman function and the most common resident interaction with it. NET-NEW: there is NO public API today; residents can only submit a web form, call, or email, and cannot machine-track a case. This schema serves both the read surface (list/get a resident's own complaints) and the write surface (file a complaint asking the ombudsman to intervene with a NYC agency).

complaintId.description: Server-assigned case number. Omit on create; returned on the created resource.

status.description: Case lifecycle status. Set by the office, not the requester.

description.description: Full description of the issue and what help is being requested.

address.description: Relevant address (e.g. the building or facility involved).

priorAgencyContact.description: Whether the resident already tried to resolve this with the agency directly.

consentToContactAgency.description: Resident consents to the Public Advocate contacting the agency on their behalf.
